channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY ­¤¬Ü Building my own container house ŌÜÆ’ĖÅ Owner Builder Learning as I go ­¤Æ¬

item.description:
View on TikTok


Rusty old marketplace fail ŌĆöŌĆöŌĆöŌĆöŌĆö> Brand new shed! With just a little bit of elbow grease added along the way ­¤śØ

item.title: This 1 tonne log was a worthy competitor for the Delica, even ra...
item.description:
View on TikTok


This 1 tonne log was a worthy competitor for the Delica, even raising one of its tyres at one stage! ­¤śØ­¤ż”ŌĆŹŌÖĆ’ĖÅ But the Delica held and I got up this giant Marri beast onto the timber mill and milled into slabs for counter tops and tables! The plan is to have Jarrah on the exterior of the house for decking etc and Marri on the interior of the house for posts and beams and so on! ­¤śŹ­¤¬Ą

item.title: My jaw almost hit the floor when I started getting quotes back f...
item.description:
View on TikTok


My jaw almost hit the floor when I started getting quotes back for windows! ­¤ż» I knew straight away I needed to come up with a solution because if I had to pay over $70kAUD not including delivery or installation then I wouldnŌĆÖt have a house to put them in. ­¤żŁ The saying ŌĆśthey donŌĆÖt make them like they use toŌĆÖ rings very true to my experience in this world, So really it was a pretty easy decision for me to go with second hand antique Jarrah timber windows ­¤¬¤ IŌĆÖm making all my decking boards from Jarrah on my property so the windows will match in beautifully and itŌĆÖs such a high quality timber so if I restore them correctly they have another 50-100 years left in them! and with Jarrah being so expensive these days I feel very luxe too ­¤śé­¤śØ

item.title: Who would have thought this log was heavier than my quad ­¤żŁ­¤ś...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Who would have thought this log was heavier than my quad ­¤żŁ­¤śé Getting this 400kg Jarrah log up onto my timber mill and milled may not have been easy but the bench tops IŌĆÖm getting from it are definitely worth it ­¤śŹ

item.title: Do I regret buying this shed off marketplace without viewing it ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Do I regret buying this shed off marketplace without viewing it first? Of courseŌĆ” (who wouldnŌĆÖt after having the shed delivered rusty and falling apart)­¤ż”ŌĆŹŌÖĆ’ĖÅ BUT in all honesty knowing me I probably would have still bought it anyway for the challenge ­¤żĘŌĆŹŌÖĆ’ĖÅ Either way IŌĆÖm stoked with how itŌĆÖs turned out and IŌĆÖve donned my crown as queen of rust ­¤æ®ŌĆŹ­¤ÅŁ­¤Æģ It took 3 days to remove rust, 1 day to put up all the walls, 1 day to install the trusses and 2.5 days of combined painting and installing the wall, roof and door sheets ŌĆ”. Not bad, maybe I should have built a shed house ­¤śØ

item.title: I have completed restoring and installing my shed! The transform...
item.description:
View on TikTok


I have completed restoring and installing my shed! The transformation from rusty junk to somewhat new looking shed is complete ­¤¬äŌ£© (I still need to install some lights, solar panels, etc and Reno down the track to an insulated space with a carport attachment )

item.title: What you may not realise is ŌĆ” This whole owner builder journey...
item.description:
View on TikTok


What you may not realise is ŌĆ” This whole owner builder journey IŌĆÖm on was a massive risk, it was an all or nothing type deal. I risked everything I had to buy land in a town I had never been to and build a house on a tiny budget that was only possible if I did all the work myself. I took that risk knowing I had no experience, no idea what I was doing and not even a friend/family member I could turn to who was in the trades. I took that risk knowing my entire career had to be put on hold and that getting back into the industry and owning a business like I had may be near on impossible. I took that risk knowing my tiny home build budget may not be enough and I may never be able to afford to complete my dream house. I took that risk knowing my savings wouldnŌĆÖt cover living costs and I would have to find a way to do that while building. The odds were against me, it was very reasonable to assume I would fail, I had family and friends tell me I was insane and itŌĆÖs not possible. BUT I had a secret, I am my biggest cheerleader and IŌĆÖm no gambling woman but I knew betting on myself and going all in was a sure deal. I am a huge believer in ŌĆśthe greater the risk the greater the rewardŌĆÖ and that you are in the control seat, directing your own life. Its a powerful thing to be able to set a vision of a future so clear that is already feels like itŌĆÖs reality. To know and believe with your whole being that anything is possible, because of your own lived experience. The mind is a powerful entity that can work with you or against you, if you can learn to use your mind as a tool any ordinary person can achieve extraordinary things. But only if we remain kind to ourselves, kinder than the world or society can be, treat yourself like a toddler learning everyday stuff. There will be falls, fails and tantrums but thatŌĆÖs okay give yourself a big cuddle and remind yourself that Rome wasnŌĆÖt built in a day, you canŌĆÖt grow a forest over night and we donŌĆÖt come out of the womb running . Evolution of self is not easy but discipline is the key to freedom, and rememberŌĆ” ŌĆ” ŌĆśThe moment you doubt whether you can fly, you cease forever to be able to do it!ŌĆÖ

item.title: For those who were wondering what I was saying while I was insta...
item.description:
View on TikTok


For those who were wondering what I was saying while I was installing that shed ŌĆ” now you donŌĆÖt have to wonder ­¤śØ­¤śé Do all building sites sound like this? ­¤żĘŌĆŹŌÖĆ’ĖÅ

item.title: 99% chance this wasnŌĆÖt possible? ­¤Öä­¤Æģ Give me extremely lo...
item.description:
View on TikTok


99% chance this wasnŌĆÖt possible? ­¤Öä­¤Æģ Give me extremely low odds any day and IŌĆÖll show you how to beat them! ­¤Æ¬

item.title: The good old ŌĆ£itŌĆÖs in good conditionŌĆØ marketplace fib ­¤żź...
item.description:
View on TikTok


The good old ŌĆ£itŌĆÖs in good conditionŌĆØ marketplace fib ­¤żź Probably should have picked it up myself but hey I was busy building a house! Safe to say IŌĆÖve learnt my lesson, always view before buying ­¤½Ī It was only $2000AUD so it could still be considered a bargain if you leave out the fact I had to work my ­¤Źæ off for it! ­¤śØ
